project.name: DDR AI System
project.tagline: Evidence-first diagnostic reporting for inspection and thermal reports.
project.deployment: Static Vercel demo for the pipeline architecture and sample outputs.

stages.title: PDF ingestion + extraction
stages.detail: Layout-aware text and image pull from inspection and thermal reports.

stages.title: Evidence builder
stages.detail: Every finding is stored with document, page, and image references.

stages.title: Image placement tagging
stages.detail: Inspection photos are linked to locations and findings when usable.

stages.title: Evidence linking
stages.detail: Claims stay grounded in page-level source references.

stages.title: Semantic normalization
stages.detail: Terminology is unified across inspection and thermal language.

stages.title: Merge + dedup
stages.detail: Only findings with matching area and content fingerprints are merged.

stages.title: Conflict + missing detection
stages.detail: Cross-document mismatches and gaps are surfaced, not hidden.

stages.title: Confidence scoring
stages.detail: Each finding is marked Green, Amber, or Red with a reason.

stages.title: Structured reasoning
stages.detail: Severity and probable cause stay rule-based and evidence aware.

stages.title: Validation layer
stages.detail: Ungrounded root causes are stripped before client composition.

stages.title: DDR composer
stages.detail: Final formatting produces the client-ready DDR plus explainability outputs.

artifacts.title: Client DDR
artifacts.description: Readable, client-facing report with grouped findings and recommendations.

artifacts.title: Explainability JSON
artifacts.description: Machine-readable finding evidence, confidence, conflicts, and cause status.

artifacts.title: Trace View
artifacts.description: Per-finding source mapping back to document pages and image references.

featuredFindings.rootCause: Root cause could not be determined from the available inspection data.
actions: Identify the moisture entry path before finishing repairs.
Repair the source area and then restore damaged plaster or paint.
featuredFindings.reasoning: Hall should be repaired, but the documents do not suggest an immediate structural risk.
conflicts: Inspection report classifies this area as low severity; thermal data indicates high. Both readings are included. Manual review recommended.

featuredFindings.normalizedObservation: Tile hollowness or joint-related issue observed in Common Bathroom.
actions: Inspect tile joints and hollow areas in Common Bathroom.
Repair damaged joints and reseal the affected surface.
featuredFindings.reasoning: Common Bathroom should be repaired, but the documents do not suggest an immediate structural risk.
